summary: Employee Module Centralization testing completed successfully. All 7 requested features tested and working correctly. Backend APIs (next-code, full-profile, duplicate validation) all passing. Frontend UI (auto-generated codes, profile modal, edit from profile) all working.

issues:
Minor HTML nesting warning:
inside

tag in Badge component (non-blocking)

features_tested.feature: Auto-generated Employee Code on Add Employee
details: Opening Add Employee form auto-populates Employee Code with next available code (EMP0004)
Code format: EMPXXXX with zero-padded number
POST /api/employees with duplicate code returns 400 error
Error message: 'Employee code already exists'
Backend properly validates uniqueness before creation
GET /api/employees/next-code returns {next_code: 'EMPXXXX'}
Correctly increments based on highest existing code
Returns EMP0001 if no employees exist
GET /api/employees/{id}/full-profile returns comprehensive data
Includes: employee info, attendance_summary, salary, performance, agreements, store info
Attendance summary shows present/absent/late counts for last 30 days

features_tested.feature: View Profile Button on Employee Card
details: Profile button has data-testid='view-profile-btn-{id}'
Clicking opens Employee Profile modal correctly
Not confused with header My Profile
Shows employee name, code, designation, department, store
Stats cards: Present (30d), Absent (30d), Avg Rating, Salary
Contact Information: Phone, Email, Address
Employment Details: Date of Joining, Department, Designation
Edit Employee and Close buttons present
Edit Employee button in profile modal opens Edit form
Form pre-populated with all employee data
Employee code field shows current code (EMP0002)

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Backend properly validates unique employee_code on create and update
GOOD: next-code API uses regex pattern ^EMP to find highest code
GOOD: full-profile API aggregates data from multiple collections (employees, attendance, salary_structures, employee_ratings, employment_agreements)
GOOD: Frontend uses data-testid for view-profile button enabling reliable test automation
GOOD: EmployeeSelector component is reusable across modules

MINOR: HTML nesting warning in profile modal - Badge component renders
inside

tag
seed_data_creation: None required - existing employee EMP0002 (Firdous Ahmad Bedar) used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee centralization fully tested. Backend: /api/employees/next-code returns next sequential code, /api/employees/{id}/full-profile returns comprehensive profile with attendance/salary/rating data, duplicate employee_code validation working. Frontend: Add Employee form auto-fills code, Profile button opens modal with all module data, Edit from profile works. EmployeeSelector component available for use in other modules.
